acceptanceCriteria.evidence: JournalDocumentPage only enables TasksFlow auto-poll when integration encryption is configured.
TasksFlow sync helpers catch decrypt/sync failures and return safe reports.
Cleaning journal renders a non-blocking toast when TasksFlow sync reports errors.
Global error boundary auto-reloads once for chunk/server-action/client-manifest deployment desync errors.
Targeted eslint, tsc --noEmit, npm run build, crypto-missing smoke, and production journal smoke passed.
